title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.808 - Police Officer Richard C Fleming Memorial Highway designated in Jackson County
text:
227.808.  Police Officer Richard C Fleming Memorial Highway designated in Jackson County. — The portion of Interstate 435 from the Kansas/Missouri state line continuing to Holmes Road in Jackson County shall be designated the "Police Officer Richard C Fleming Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2022 H.B. 1738)
